transcript: So when we talk about the country of Bhutan, what are the first few words that come to your mind? Clean. It is the world's only carbon negative country. 70% covered by the forest and majority of the electricity consumption is by the renewable electric, hydro electricity. The next word, someone said happy. It was perceived as world's happiest country because the country is pursuing instead of GDP, but GNH. Gross National Happiness. That the country believe the economic development should prioritize the well-being of the people. And finally, safe. It is a Himalaya Buddhist country that advocate peace, harmony, and empathy. Enjoy extremely low crime rate. But maybe you do not know that Bhutan is also into the transition of web3, crypto, and digital asset. The country has been in a national scale of Bitcoin mining since 2019. And Bhutan today has one of the world's largest Bitcoin reserve in among the sovereign nations. At the beginning of the years, the Bhutan also announced to include Bitcoin and some other cryptocurrencies into the national reserve. Bhutan is the first country in the world to enable cryptocurrency among the country's tourism system. So you can go to the country to travel without using fiat money to pay anything. And it is also a country that has put 800,000 people of national digital identity on blockchain to enable its citizens to access government services and information. And today, we are very excited to announce another development that Bhutan has with Solana to progress to the country's next step towards crypto friendly and development. Bhutan is launching on Solana, world's first sovereign gold backed token on the 17th of December 2025, which is the National Day of Bhutan. The token is named TER. TER means treasure in the traditional Bhutanese. And gold to the Bhutanese is a very valuable asset, not just to the Bhutanese, but also to the 2 billion people in the subcontinent, which is traditionally and culturally a very important asset. So for us, for the sovereign country to tokenize the most valuable asset on a public chain, that means a lot to us. And that also says our trust that we place in Solana as a public chain. There are a few key differences between this token versus other tokens. First, this is a sovereign backed token. And number two, we launch it with a purpose. The country would like to have economic development blended with the most advanced technology, but to preserve its culture and tradition. And in order to do that, we have make this token extremely accessible. One TER is equal to 0.01 gram of 9999 gold, which is approximately $1.30. So we ensure every everyday Bhutanese can access this token with minimum wealth that they need. And finally, we are working on this very exciting feature of physically redemption, where you just need to hold as minimum as 20 gram equivalent of TER, that will allow you to physically redeem into 9999 gold coin or gold bar, and will be securely delivered to you anywhere in the world. As the official custodian and distributor for the TER token, DK is a bank where I coming from, founded by His Majesty, and is the official bank for Gelephu Mindfulness City. And the bank would like to leverage on the country's Bitcoin mining capacity and its favorable policy of cryptocurrency and offer all the crypto companies a global banking partnership. And finally, the 17th of December launch is mostly for Bhutanese, but we also have a open invitation for everybody who is interested and to pre-register with us. And we would love to have you experience the world's first sovereign backed gold token. And finally, I wish to see you in the TER community or in the beautiful country of Bhutan. Tashi Delek La. Thank you.

enrichment.generated_query: DK Bank / TER Token Product Keynote: DK Bank Breakpoint 2025 announcement

sources.snippet:
Media Release
Media Release 1 | 6
Issued by the media relations department of Deutsche Bank AG
Taunusanlage 12, 60325 Frankfurt am Main
Internet: db.com/news
Email: db.media@db.com
Scaling the Global Hausbank: Deutsche Bank 
launches new phase of growth and value creation
– Return on tangible equity target raised to greater than 13% by 2028
– Payout ratio planned to increase to 60% from 2026
Deutsche Bank today announces the next phase of its strategy and financial 
targets for 2028. Having restored the bank’s profitability and strengthened its 
foundations, management’s focus in the next phase will be on accelerating value 
creation by scaling the Global Hausbank. Deutsche Bank’s goal is to tap significant 
further growth potential, building on its position as the trusted partner for clients 
in a changing environment.
Deutsche Bank’s longer-term vision is to become the European champion in 
banking, characterized by leadership in key business segments on a European 
level, market-leading returns and a deep and scaled global presence, based on a 
resilient business model leveraging the potential of AI and a strong balance sheet.
The bank has set objectives for significant growth in revenues, profitability and 
returns to shareholders over the period to 2028. It aims to achieve these goals by 
deploying three key levers: focused business growth, strict capital discipline and 
implementing a scalable operating model. All levers are supported by disciplined 
use of the bank’s Shareholder Value Add (SVA) performance framework.
Deutsche Bank’s financial objectives for the period to 2028 include:
• Achieving a Return on Tangible Equity (RoTE) target of greater than 13% by 
2028, up from the bank’s 2025 target of above 10%
• Driving compound annual revenue growth of above 5%, with revenues rising 
from a forecast of around € 32 billion in 2025 to around € 37 billion in 2028
• Reaching a cost/income ratio target of below 60% by 2028, down from the 
bank’s 2025 target of below 65%. The bank aims to make continued 
investments in business growth and technology while driving targeted 
programs to deliver gross cost efficiencies of approximately € 2 billion
• Maintaining a Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio within an 
unchanged intended operating range of 13.5-14.0%
 Frankfurt am Main 17 November 2025
Media Release 2 | 6
• Raising the payout ratio to 60% of net profit attributable to Deutsche Bank 
shareholders from 2026, up from the bank’s current target of 50%. The bank 
sees scope to make additional distributions of excess capital, or deploy this 
capital to support focused growth, when the CET1 capital ratio is 
sustainably above 14% 
“Thanks to the progress we made over the past years, we are better equipped than 
ever to support our clients as their trusted partner in a fast-changing environment,
and to generate more value for our shareholders,” Christian Sewing, Chief 
Executive Officer, said. “As the Global Hausbank, we plan to grow by building on 
our position as the market leader in Germany, the European alternative in global 
banking, and the gateway to Europe for clients around the world.”
He continued: “Our long-term vision is to be the European champion, and we have 
everything in our hands to make this a reality. Over the next three years, we will 
focus even more on our clients’ needs, and on those markets and businesses where 
we are or can be a leader, while transforming our processes to become more 
integrated and automated. We have all the necessary levers at our disposal to 
increase our RoTE to greater than 13 percent by 2028 and we see significant
potential to exceed this level on our path to market-leading returns.”
Focused growth
In 2026-2028, Deutsche Bank aims to drive focused growth in the most valueaccretive areas. The bank aims to achieve this by capitalizing on its leading 
position in its home market, integrating its Global Hausbank offering to provide a 
seamless client experience and leveraging i

sources.title: Deutsche Bank successfully completes issuance of Additional Tier 1 capital instruments
sources.snippet:
Deutsche Bank successfully completes issuance of Additional Tier 1 capital instruments
Skip to main contentopen navigationclose Navigation[![Deutsche Bank](https://www.db.com/application/project/images/logos/identifier_RETINA.png)](https://www.db.com/)[Home](https://www.db.com/)Skip main navigation
Themen:
* [Financial ResultsFinancial Results](https://www.db.com/media/news?tags=financialResults)
Media ReleaseNovember 24, 2025
# Deutsche Bank successfully completes issuance of Additional Tier 1 capital instruments
Deutsche Bank AG (XETRA: DBKGn.DE / NYSE: DB) today issued Additional Tier 1 (AT1) capital instruments with a total principal amount of € 1.0 billion. The issuance supports Deutsche Bank’s Tier 1 leverage ratio and its Tier 1 and Total Capital solvency ratios.
The securities will bear a fixed coupon of 6.750%, payable annually, until April 30, 2035. The Bank can call the securities, subject to prior supervisory approval, on each day between October 30, 2034 and April 30, 2035, thereafter between October 30 and April 30 every five years. The applicable interest rate will be reset at five-year intervals starting on April 30, 2035 on the basis of the then prevailing 5-year Euro swap rate plus the initial credit spread of 4.036% per year.
The new AT1 securities (ISIN: DE000A460DG7) are expected to be listed on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange and traded on its regulated market.
The denominations of the securities are € 200,000. Deutsche Bank AG acted as sole bookrunner for the offering.
The securities of Deutsche Bank AG mentioned in this release have not been registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (“Securities Act”) and will be issued under “Regulation S” of the Securities Act only and may not be offered, sold or delivered within the United States absent registration under the Securities Act or an exemption from registration requirements.
## About Deutsche Bank
Deutsche Bank provides retail and private banking, corporate and transaction banking, lending, asset and wealth management products and services as well as focused investment banking to private individuals, small and medium-sized companies, corporations, governments and institutional investors. Deutsche Bank is the leading bank in Germany with strong European roots and a global network.
This release contains forward-looking statements. Forward-looking statements are statements that are not historical facts; they include statements about our beliefs and expectations and the assumptions underlying them. These statements are based on plans, estimates and projections as they are currently available to the management of Deutsche Bank. Forward-looking statements therefore speak only as of the date they are made, and we undertake no obligation to update publicly any of them in light of new information or future events.
By their very nature, forward-looking statements involve risks and uncertainties. A number of important factors could therefore cause actual results to differ materially from those contained in any forward-looking statement.
Such factors include the conditions in the financial markets in Germany, in Europe, in the United States and elsewhere from which we derive a substantial portion of our revenues and in which we hold a substantial portion of our assets, the development of asset prices and market volatility, potential defaults of borrowers or trading counterparties, the implementation of our strategic initiatives, the reliability of our risk management policies, procedures and methods, and other risks referenced in our filings with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
Such factors are described in detail in our SEC Form 20-F of 13 March 2025 under the heading “Risk Factors”. Copies of this document are readily available upon request or can be downloaded from[www.db.com/ir](http://www.db.com/ir).

Ad-hoc ReleaseNovember 24, 2025
# Deutsche Bank to issue Additional Tier 1 capital instruments
Disclosure of inside information according to Article 17 of Regulation (EU) No 596/2014 (Market Abuse Regulation)
Frankfurt am Main, November 24, 2025–– 9:40 CET –– Deutsche Bank AG (XETRA: DBKGn.DE / NYSE: DB) announces its intention to issue securities that qualify as Additional Tier 1 (AT1) capital instruments.
The issuance, with a first call date on October 30, 2034, is intended to be of benchmark size. It will support Deutsche Bank’’s Tier 1 leverage ratio and its Tier 1 and Total Capital solvency ratios.
The securities will be issued based on the authorization granted by the Annual General Meeting in 2025 under exclusion of shareholders’’ pre-emptive rights. The denominations of the securities will be €€ 200,000. Deutsche Bank AG will act as sole bookrunner for the placement.
The securities of Deutsche Bank AG mentioned in this release have not been registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended (““Securities Act””) and will be issued under ““Regulation S”” of the Securities Act only and may not be offered, sold or delivered within the United States absent registration under the Securities Act or an exemption from registration requirements.
Deutsche Bank AG
Taunusanlage 12
60325 Frankfurt am Main
Germany

WKN: 514000

tags.impact_reason: A sovereign nation launching a gold-backed token on Solana could bring significant attention and adoption, especially within the subcontinent, but the real impact depends on the token's success and adoption post-launch in 2025.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a Bhutanese Prayer Wheel as the 'Semantic Anchor' because it perfectly fuses Bhutan's deep spiritual heritage with the futuristic nature of the story. Making it from polished gold directly represents the gold-backed 'TER' token, whose name means 'treasure'. I included the text 'TER' diegetically, engraved into the wheel and glowing with an inner light, to signify the token as a sacred, modern treasure integrated into the nation's core identity.
visual_idea.description: In a minimalist, dark stone temple interior, a massive, ornate Bhutanese prayer wheel made of polished, reflective gold is the central focus. The word 'TER' is meticulously engraved into the golden surface, its letters glowing from within with a soft, Solana-purple light. Intricate blockchain-like circuits, glowing with the same purple and green hues, are subtly embedded into the traditional patterns of the wheel. Through a large circular window in the background, the misty green peaks of the Himalayas are visible under a twilight sky, creating a deep sense of scale and place.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A monumental, ornate Bhutanese prayer wheel, crafted from highly polished, reflective gold, stands as the central focus within a minimalist, dark stone temple interior. The golden surface of the wheel is meticulously engraved with the word 'TER', its letters glowing from within with a soft, Solana-purple light. Intricate blockchain-like circuits, radiating the same ethereal purple and green hues, are subtly interwoven into the traditional patterns of the wheel. Through a large circular window in the background, the misty green peaks of the Himalayas are visible under a twilight sky, creating an epic sense of scale and place. The scene is illuminated by dramatic volumetric light beams, highlighting the polished metallic surfaces with warm amber reflections and creating deep shadows within the temple. Composition is vertical (3:4 aspect ratio), emphasizing extreme height and monumental scale, with generous negative space at the top to convey grandeur. The overall aesthetic is one of sacred technology, with ultra-photorealistic textures and cinematic golden-hour lighting for the exterior vista. 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, high dynamic range, ultra-photorealistic, cinematic.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose a Bhutanese Prayer Wheel as the 'Semantic Anchor' because it perfectly fuses Bhutan's deep spiritual heritage with the futuristic nature of the story. Making it from polished gold directly represents the gold-backed 'TER' token, whose name means 'treasure'. I included the text 'TER' diegetically, engraved into the wheel and glowing with an inner light, to signify the token as a sacred, modern treasure integrated into the nation's core identity.
visual_idea.description: A macro shot focusing on the textured surface of the golden prayer wheel. The frame is filled with the intricate, traditional Bhutanese patterns hammered into the gleaming gold. We can see the subtle glow of Solana-colored graphene circuits embedded just beneath the surface, tracing the lines of the ancient designs. The lighting highlights the warm reflection of the gold against the cool, futuristic light of the circuitry, emphasizing the fusion of materials and eras. NO TEXT.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A macro shot focusing on the textured surface of a golden prayer wheel. The square frame is entirely filled with intricate, traditional Bhutanese patterns hammered into the gleaming, polished gold, exhibiting warm amber reflections. Embedded just beneath the surface, subtle Solana-colored graphene circuits emit a cool, futuristic glow, precisely tracing the lines of the ancient designs. Volumetric lighting, akin to cinematic golden-hour light, dramatically highlights the warm, soft reflections of the gold, contrasting with the cool, ethereal light of the embedded circuitry. This emphasizes a harmonious fusion of sacred ancient craftsmanship and advanced technology. The composition is symmetrical and centrally focused, with an extremely tight macro framing to reveal every microtextural detail. No text. 1:1 aspect ratio, 8k, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, ultra-photorealistic, cinematic, high dynamic range, V6 realism.

editorial.headline: Bhutan Issues Sovereign Gold-Backed Token on Solana Mainnet
editorial.standfirst: The Kingdom of Bhutan escalates its national crypto strategy, designating DK Bank to issue the 'TER' token as the financial backbone of the Gelephu Mindfulness City.
key_takeaways: Asset Spec: 1 TER token represents 0.01 grams of gold (~$1.30), ensuring mass accessibility.
Issuer: DK Bank, the official digital bank of the Gelephu Mindfulness City (GMC).
editorial.article_body_markdown:
In a move that significantly validates public blockchain infrastructure for state-level assets, the Kingdom of Bhutan has announced the launch of **TER**, a sovereign gold-backed token on Solana. Scheduled for deployment on December 17, 2025—Bhutan’s National Day—the initiative is spearheaded by **DK Bank**, the newly established official digital bank of the **Gelephu Mindfulness City (GMC)**. This is not merely a pilot; it is a full integration of national treasury assets with permissionless ledger technology, signaling a shift from private enterprise stablecoins to sovereign-issued on-chain commodities.

The strategic choice of Solana highlights a growing institutional preference for high-throughput, low-latency networks over private permissioned chains. **Yudong Zheng**, representing DK Bank, confirmed that the token is designed for high-velocity transaction capability while retaining the stability of a hard asset. Unlike typical gold derivatives that cater to high-net-worth individuals, TER is fractionalized to 0.01 grams (approximately $1.30 USD), democratizing access to gold for the average Bhutanese citizen while maintaining a physical redemption floor of just 20 grams.

This development is the latest layer in Bhutan’s aggressive digital asset strategy. The nation has been quietly mining Bitcoin at a sovereign scale since 2019, utilizing its surplus hydroelectric power, and already holds one of the world's largest government-owned Bitcoin reserves. The launch of TER serves as the monetary foundation for the **Gelephu Mindfulness City**, a Special Administrative Region (SAR) designed to be a crypto-economic hub. By anchoring the region’s financial system to a gold-backed token rather than a purely fiat currency, Bhutan is positioning GMC as a safe harbor for digital capital.

Perhaps the most immediate "alpha" for the institutional audience is DK Bank’s mandate. Beyond issuing TER, the bank is explicitly positioning itself as a global banking partner for crypto-native companies—a sector historically plagued by debanking risks. By leveraging Bhutan’s favorable regulatory framework and sovereign backing, DK Bank aims to become a critical fiat on-ramp/off-ramp for the industry, effectively turning the country into a sovereign-backed service provider for the global Web3 economy.
